.. _boxedline:

boxedline
=========

**inherit_from**: ['line']

Summary
-------

+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|keyword             |default             |attribute           |value               |
+====================+====================+====================+====================+
|**annotation**      |None                |                    |                    |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |*unique*            |True                |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|**annotation_font** |                    |                    |                    |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |*alias*             |font                |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |*type*              |plotfont            |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |*unique*            |True                |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|**graphics**        |                    |                    |                    |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |*type*              |graphics            |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |*unique*            |True                |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|**kind**            |line                |                    |                    |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |*unique*            |True                |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|**plotdata**        |None                |                    |                    |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |*optional*          |True                |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |*unique*            |True                |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|**rectangle**       |                    |                    |                    |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |*alias*             |rect                |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |*type*              |rectangle           |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |*unique*            |True                |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|**symbol**          |                    |                    |                    |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |*type*              |symbol              |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |*unique*            |True                |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|**user_legend**     |None                |                    |                    |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |*alias*             |legend              |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |*lowercase*         |False               |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |*optional*          |True                |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |*unique*            |True                |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+

Keywords
--------

annotation
^^^^^^^^^^

default: **None**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

annotation_font
^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

default: **""**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|alias                                            |font                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|type                                             |plotfont                                         |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

^^^^^^^^

default: **""**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |

|type                                             |graphics                                         |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

^^^^

default: **line**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

default: **None**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |

|optional                                         |True                                             |
